codeReview.summary: Implementation satisfies the feature requirements: dark color tokens were standardized to #1a1816 in the specified files, countdown HTML/CSS/JS/GSAP references were removed, and commit-level grep checks show zero remaining #231e19, #0a0a0a, rgba(35, 30, 25), rgba(26, 23, 20), and countdown matches under src/.

sharedStateObservations.observation: Shared architecture guidance is now stale after this feature: it still describes countdown UI and old dark color values as current state, which can mislead later workers.
sharedStateObservations.evidence: .factory/library/architecture.md:7 describes index.astro as containing a countdown timer; lines 19-22 still list #0a0a0a and #231e19 as current values to be changed.

summary: Review passed: no blocking correctness or security issues found, and the feature behavior matches its intended assertions. One shared-state documentation staleness observation was recorded.
